PublishingInfo.Description: Provides Object Detection in Python>=3.8 using YOLOv11. Great for newer NVIDIA GPUs and Apple Silicon.
PublishingInfo.Author: CodeProject

DownloadableModels.Name: YOLOv11 Object Detection all sizes
DownloadableModels.Description: YOLOv11 object detection using the COCO dataset. Sizes N(ano), S, M, L, XL

DownloadableModels.Name: YOLOv11 Object Segmentation all sizes
DownloadableModels.Description: YOLOv11 object segmentation for the COCO dataset. Sizes N(ano), S, M, L, XL

DownloadableModels.Name: YOLOv11 Custom models
DownloadableModels.Description: YOLOv11 custom object detection: General IPCam, License plate

RouteMaps.Name: Object Detector (YOLOv11)
RouteMaps.Description: Detects multiple objects, of 80 different possible types, in an image.

Inputs.Name: image
Inputs.Description: The HTTP file object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: min_confidence
Inputs.Description: The minimum confidence level for an object to be detected. In the range 0.0 to 1.0. Default 0.4.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: message
Outputs.Description: A summary of the inference operation.

Outputs.Name: error
Outputs.Description: (Optional) A description of the error if success was false.

Outputs.Name: predictions
Outputs.Description: An array of objects with x_max, x_min, y_max, y_min, label, and confidence.

Outputs.Name: count
Outputs.Description: The number of objects found.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image (includes inference and image manipulation).

RouteMaps.Name: Custom Object Detector (YOLOv11)
RouteMaps.Description: Detects objects based on YOLOv11 PyTorch models. Models are stored as .pt files in the custom-models directory. To call a specific model use /vision/custom/model-name where 'model-name' is the .pt filename without extension.

Inputs.Name: image
Inputs.Description: The HTTP file object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: min_confidence
Inputs.Description: The minimum confidence level for an object to be detected. In the range 0.0 to 1.0. Default 0.4.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: message
Outputs.Description: A summary of the inference operation.

Outputs.Name: error
Outputs.Description: (Optional) A description of the error if success was false.

Outputs.Name: predictions
Outputs.Description: An array of objects with x_max, x_min, y_max, y_min, label, and confidence.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image.

RouteMaps.Name: Object Segmentation (YOLOv11)
RouteMaps.Description: Segment multiple objects in an image.

Inputs.Name: image
Inputs.Description: The HTTP file object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: min_confidence
Inputs.Description: The minimum confidence level for an object to be detected. In the range 0.0 to 1.0. Default 0.4.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: message
Outputs.Description: A summary of the inference operation.

Outputs.Name: error
Outputs.Description: (Optional) A description of the error if success was false.

Outputs.Name: predictions
Outputs.Description: An array of objects with x_max, x_min, y_max, y_min, label, confidence, and mask polygon.

Outputs.Name: count
Outputs.Description: The number of objects found.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image.

RouteMaps.Name: Object Detector List Custom Models (YOLOv11)
RouteMaps.Description: Returns a list of custom YOLOv11 models available in the custom-models directory.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: models
Outputs.Description: An array of model names installed in the custom-models directory.
